title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2025-13, dated October 10, 2025, entitled "Resolution approving and endorsing the Supplemental Investment Plan of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for additional priority programs, projects and activities totaling to Seven Million Fifty Thousand Seven Hundred Thirty-Eight Pesos and 44/100 (Php 7,050,738.44).
